books.title: Getty-Dubay® Italic Handwriting Book D
books.author: Handwriting Success
books.rationale: Writing practice for basic italic and cursive italic includes capitalization, vowel and consonant sounds, prefixes, suffixes, phonograms, homophones, tongue twisters, and six poem forms. Cursive capitals are introduced with historical development of each letter.

books.title: Italics: Beautiful Handwriting for Children
books.author: Penny Gardner
books.rationale: We like this model because it is lovely, yet simple. Both the print and cursive models are in italic, making this a solid foundation for fine lettering later. Some may prefer a more traditional cursive model.
